'''鈭歵-k-j''' ('''katakaj''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:unbeautify|unbeautify]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| t-k-j
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:unbeautify|unbeautify]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歵-k-j
|-
! Lemma
| katakaj
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thitakaj|thitakaj]] || [[word:jitakaj|jitakaj]] || [[word:shitakaj|shitakaj]] || [[word:kitakaj|kitakaj]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthutakaj|thuthutakaj]] || [[word:jujutakaj|jujutakaj]] || [[word:shushutakaj|shushutakaj]] || [[word:kukutakaj|kukutakaj]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thutakaj|thutakaj]] || [[word:jutakaj|jutakaj]] || [[word:shutakaj|shutakaj]] || [[word:kutakaj|kutakaj]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thutakaj|thutakaj]] || [[word:jutakaj|jutakaj]] || [[word:shutakaj|shutakaj]] || [[word:kutakaj|kutakaj]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thetakaj|thetakaj]] || [[word:jetakaj|jetakaj]] || [[word:shetakaj|shetakaj]] || [[word:ketakaj|ketakaj]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothotakaj|thothotakaj]] || [[word:jojotakaj|jojotakaj]] || [[word:shoshotakaj|shoshotakaj]] || [[word:kokotakaj|kokotakaj]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thotakaj|thotakaj]] || [[word:jotakaj|jotakaj]] || [[word:shotakaj|shotakaj]] || [[word:kotakaj|kotakaj]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thotakaj|thotakaj]] || [[word:jotakaj|jotakaj]] || [[word:shotakaj|shotakaj]] || [[word:kotakaj|kotakaj]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙takaj|th忙takaj]] || [[word:j忙takaj|j忙takaj]] || [[word:sh忙takaj|sh忙takaj]] || [[word:k忙takaj|k忙takaj]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathatakaj|thathatakaj]] || [[word:jajatakaj|jajatakaj]] || [[word:shashatakaj|shashatakaj]] || [[word:kakatakaj|kakatakaj]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thatakaj|thatakaj]] || [[word:jatakaj|jatakaj]] || [[word:shatakaj|shatakaj]] || [[word:katakaj|katakaj]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thatakaj|thatakaj]] || [[word:jatakaj|jatakaj]] || [[word:shatakaj|shatakaj]] || [[word:katakaj|katakaj]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shatakaj|shatakaj]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshatakaj|goshatakaj]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishatakaj|gokishatakaj]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shatakajn眉|shatakajn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshatakajnkn眉|goshatakajnkn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishatakajn眉|gokishatakajn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shatakajsh毛|shatakajsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshatakajnksh毛|goshatakajnksh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishatakajsh毛|gokishatakajsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shatakajro|shatakajro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshatakajnkro|goshatakajnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishatakajro|gokishatakajro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shatakajmu|shatakajmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshatakajnkmu|goshatakajnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishatakajmu|gokishatakajmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shatakajsher|shatakajsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshatakajnksher|goshatakajnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishatakajsher|gokishatakajsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shatakajng|shatakajng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshatakajnkng|goshatakajnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishatakajng|gokishatakajng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shatakajya|shatakajya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshatakajnkya|goshatakajnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishatakajya|gokishatakajya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shatakajyam|shatakajyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshatakajnkyam|goshatakajnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishatakajyam|gokishatakajyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shatakajn眉sh毛|shatakajn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshatakajnkn眉sh毛|goshatakajnkn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishatakajn眉sh毛|gokishatakajn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shatakajn眉ro|shatakajn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshatakajnkn眉ro|goshatakajnkn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishatakajn眉ro|gokishatakajn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shatakajn眉mu|shatakajn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshatakajnkn眉mu|goshatakajnkn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishatakajn眉mu|gokishatakajn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shatakajsh毛n眉|shatakajsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshatakajnksh毛n眉|goshatakajnksh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishatakajsh毛n眉|gokishatakajsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shatakajsh毛ro|shatakajsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshatakajnksh毛ro|goshatakajnksh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishatakajsh毛ro|gokishatakajsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shatakajsh毛mu|shatakajsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshatakajnksh毛mu|goshatakajnksh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishatakajsh毛mu|gokishatakajsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shatakajron眉|shatakajron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshatakajnkron眉|goshatakajnkron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishatakajron眉|gokishatakajron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shatakajrosh毛|shatakajrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshatakajnkrosh毛|goshatakajnkrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishatakajrosh毛|gokishatakajrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shatakajromu|shatakajromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshatakajnkromu|goshatakajnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishatakajromu|gokishatakajromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shatakajmun眉|shatakajmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshatakajnkmun眉|goshatakajnkmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishatakajmun眉|gokishatakajmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shatakajmush毛|shatakajmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshatakajnkmush毛|goshatakajnkmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishatakajmush毛|gokishatakajmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shatakajmuro|shatakajmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshatakajnkmuro|goshatakajnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishatakajmuro|gokishatakajmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|806ef69}}
